title: The campfire
body:
![modpack logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20eea73b71b0c3d7be866e96a0f7c9b3915efb64.jpeg)
**Do you want to explore in a peaceful world?
Do you want to try cooking different foods?
Then, try playing this well-optimized modpack!
This modpack is designed to be easy and fun for everyone to play!**

<details>
<summary>Modpack contents</summary>

- The first time you join a world, you get a saddled horse.
- Different crops and foods, and different biomes to explore!
- Season system (different growth rates of crops)
- Many structures to explore
- Includes many optimization mod!

</details>
